project.name: myTechNews
project.description: Tech news aggregator with Gemini AI summarization and filtering.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Express API server listening on port 3001. Handles memory caching and endpoints /api/news and /api/refresh.

nodes.name: aggregator.js
nodes.summary: Core news scraping engine. Fetches news from 22 tech sources and parallel processes them using Gemini 2.5 Flash.

nodes.name: aggregator.test.js
nodes.summary: Unit tests for helper classification, filtering, and de-duplication functions in aggregator.js.

nodes.name: server.test.js
nodes.summary: Integration tests spawning the Express app on port 3002, fetching news, and cleanly killing the child process.

nodes.name: NewsFeed.tsx
nodes.summary: React component displaying the compiled news articles. Features a clean category selector and live filters.

nodes.name: ReplacementMatrix.tsx
nodes.summary: AI replacement matrix dashboard component comparing model capabilities across technical roles.

nodes.name: LlmComponents.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive visualizer illustrating steps in the transformer forward pass architecture.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Repository guidelines, architectural design (SOLID & DRY), and test harness setup.

nodes.name: GEMINI.md
nodes.summary: Context7 platform rules and behaviors for fetching up-to-date documentation.

tour.title: Introduction
tour.description: Start by reading AGENTS.md to understand repo principles.

tour.title: Backend Aggregator
tour.description: Explore the backend routing and parallel scraping mechanics.

tour.title: Frontend Views
tour.description: Inspect the visual panels of our React frontend client.
